hooks.command: jq -c 'if (.tool_input.command // "" | test("git commit")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Commit landed — review the change. Look for real issues: regressions, missed edge cases, weak coverage, security/perf concerns, deferred work surfaced by this change. Small items (typos, dead imports, comment polish, obvious refactors) — fix on the spot in a follow-up commit, do not ask. Substantive issues with more than one reasonable resolution — name the issue, list the options with trade-offs, ask which to take. Nothing to flag — confirm in one sentence and move on. Skip multi-section recaps and diff narration; the user can already see the diff."}} else empty end'
